LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeapons.label: disassemble firearm
LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeaponsI.description: Disassemble precise firearms into weapon components.
LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeaponsI.label: disassemble precise firearm
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleHeavyArmor.description: Disassemble heavy armor into armor plates and fibers.
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleHeavyArmor.label: disassemble heavy armor
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleLightArmor.description: Disassemble light armor into armor plates and fibers.
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleLightArmor.label: disassemble light armor
LanguageData.AM_DisassemblePolyethylenePlate.descript: Remove the aramid fabric layer from the polyethylene armor plate to recycle precious aramid.
LanguageData.AM_DisassemblePolyethylenePlate.label: disassemble polyethylene plate
